description: A1 foundational topic — regular verb conjugation, no case table needed
A2 topic with a genuine dative-vs-accusative decision rule (Wechselpräpositionen)
table_hint: list of the nine two-way prepositions with the wohin?/wo? (accusative/dative) test

description: B1 topic — polite requests and hypotheticals, more abstract, still needs a form table
topic: Konjunktiv II — polite requests and hypotheticals
table_hint: würde + infinitive and irregular Konjunktiv II forms (wäre, hätte, könnte...)

description: B2 advanced topic — passive voice combined with modal verbs
table_hint: modal + Partizip II + werden/worden word order pattern
